summary: Randomizer feature fully tested - all backend API tests passed (13/13) and frontend UI tests passed. Feature correctly picks random record from owned collection, shows modal with album art/title/artist/variant, supports optional caption, and creates NOW_SPINNING posts.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/collection/random endpoint correctly uses MongoDB $sample aggregation for randomness
Endpoint properly filters with source: $nin ['wantlist', 'dreamlist', 'iso'] to exclude non-owned records
Frontend ComposerBar.js correctly has fetchRandomRecord function that calls /api/collection/random
Modal displays album art, title, artist, and variant (color_variant or pressing_notes)
Caption field is optional and correctly submitted with the post
Both 'Post to Hive' and 'Spin This Now' use same /api/composer/now-spinning endpoint
Try Another button correctly triggers new random fetch
Cancel button correctly closes the modal
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified - Randomizer button, modal, record display, 4 action buttons, caption field)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user collection (1 record: Igor by Tyler, The Creator)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Randomizer feature is fully implemented and working. Demo user (demouser) has 1 record in owned collection, so GET /api/collection/random always returns the same record (Igor by Tyler, The Creator). This is expected behavior per the agent_to_agent_context_note. The endpoint uses MongoDB $sample aggregation for true randomness when multiple records exist.

features_tested.GET_collection_random_returns_record: PASS - Returns random record with id/title/artist/cover_url
features_tested.GET_collection_random_has_expected_field: PASS - All fields present: id, title, artist, cover_url, user_id
features_tested.multiple_random_calls_work: PASS - Can be called multiple times
features_tested.UI_modal_shows_record: PASS - Shows album art, title, artist, variant
features_tested.UI_try_another_button: PASS - Button works, fetches new record
